title: Elections Alberta issues cease-and-desist letters over voter info breach, privacy commissioner launches probe
author: Wallis Snowdon
notes: FACTUAL ANCHOR for EVT-028 (Centurion Project). Court of King's Bench temporary injunction granted ~Apr 30 2026; database of ~2.9M voters taken down; cease-and-desist to 568 people (23 who received list + 545 who accessed); permanent-injunction hearing set late July; privacy commissioner (McLeod) investigating under PIPA s.36(1)(a); RCMP parallel investigation. List sourced from Republican Party of Alberta's legitimately-issued copy, used by Centurion (third-party advertiser) in unauthorized manner. Justice Thomas Rothwell.
